_WARNING: Field names verified against live Zoho Mail API documentation.
_verified_by: Tony Grant / Claude Code — live API docs

messages.list_response_structure: { status: {...}, data: [ {...message objects...} ] } — array is directly under data, NOT data.messages

list_params.folderId: integer (account-specific — query folders endpoint by folderType)

message_fields.messageId: string — internal Zoho message ID (VERIFIED: this is the correct field, not msgId)
message_fields.subject: string
message_fields.summary: string — body snippet only (NOT the full body — requires separate content call)
message_fields._note: Full body content requires a separate GET to the content endpoint

response_fields.content: string — HTML body (VERIFIED: field is 'content', not 'htmlContent')

threads._note: Thread response wraps messages directly under data as a flat array — NOT data.messages

create_payload.subject: string
create_payload.inReplyTo: string — RFC 2822 Message-ID of the email being replied to (confirmed)
create_payload.refHeader: string — chain of Message-IDs for thread context
create_payload.mode: string — set to 'draft' for saving as draft
create_payload._correction: threadId does NOT exist as a draft payload field. Use inReplyTo + refHeader for thread context. Any threadId field sent will be silently ignored.

folders._critical: Folder IDs are account-specific dynamic values — NOT fixed integers. inbox=1 and sent=5 are WRONG. Must query this endpoint on first run and look up by folderType.
